description.value: Aura faint enchantment; CL 5th; Weight â; Price +1 Bonus DESCRIPTION Anytime the wearer of bolstering armor damages a creature with a melee or ranged attack, he gains a +2 competence bonus on saving throws against that creature’s abilities until the start of his next turn. The bolstering ability can be applied to medium armor, heavy armor, light shields, heavy shields, and tower shields, but not light armor or bucklers. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells heroism; Cost +1 bonus
